title: [Python] [CI Integration Tests] Bindings broken
body:
https://github.com/llvm/circt/runs/3640159047?check_suite_focus=true

According to `git bisect`,
```
471e60ceafc8dc43fa7e582ca35d5830ed6a0aa9 is the first bad commit
commit 471e60ceafc8dc43fa7e582ca35d5830ed6a0aa9
Author: Chris Lattner <clattner@nondot.org>
Date:   Fri Sep 17 17:48:38 2021 -0700

    [HW] Add support for parameter decls to the hw.module* operations.

    This adds IR support to parse and print them, but there is no export
    verilog support yet.
```

FYI @lattner, 471e60ceafc8dc43fa7e582ca35d5830ed6a0aa9 is the offending commit.
